Let's Get Started

Empower Your Business with Our Fractional Legal Support

Headquartered in Florida, Margolis PLLC focuses its practice on providing corporate clients, founders, and entrepreneurs the ability to have a legal department on a flexible, fractional basis.

Whether you’re just starting your business or an expansive enterprise pushing into new jurisdictions, we will be there to provide the legal services you need to continue  to reach your goals.
